Nicotiana, commonly known as the Nicipe flexuosa or the tobbacco plant, is a genus of flowering plants in the nightshade family (Solanaceae). The leaves and flowers of Nicotiana species have been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to their expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties.
